intentSynonyms: look up problem stats in leetcode
fetch a single problem stats in leetcode
view one specific problem stats in leetcode
get problem acceptance stats in leetcode
description: Get statistics for a problem including total accepted/submitted counts, acceptance rate, and likes/dislikes. The stats field is a JSON string with totalAccepted, totalSubmission, totalAcceptedRaw, totalSubmissionRaw, and acRate.
